📡 API Access

Access our comprehensive AI model database via our REST API:

  • All Models: /api.json
  • Model Schema: /model-schema.json
  • Provider Logos: /logos/{provider}.svg

Example: curl $(location.origin)/api.json

Built with 🦀 Rust | GitHub | Live Demo
